creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 184840
Proposed patch for games/naev-data (since 422006 revision)

Patch to update games/naev and games/naev-data ports from 0.6.1 to 0.7.0 version.

Look following links for changes:
http://blog.naev.org/2017/07/naev-0-7-0-release/
https://github.com/naev/naev/compare/naev-0.6.1...naev-0.7.0

Changes for games/naev-data:
- Use DISTVERSIONSUFFIX instead of DISTNAME, because of new ndata filename

Changes for games/naev:
- Update ndata filename for RUN_DEPENDS and --with-ndata-path configure option
- Add gl to USE_GL
- Cosmetic change for PLIST_FILES
- Add configurable options for Lua scripting language

The build was tested for FreeBSD 10.3 amd64 (native and with using poudriere).
